title: Create: Winter Apocalypse
description: A zombie survival, but during wintertime and with create.
body:
# Information
This pack was made with cozyness and the warming feeling of Christmas and wintertime in mind whilst also keeping it scary and difficult enough to be a challenging survival experience.

### Snow Everywhere
It will always be snowing in your world, except for the desert, to really keep that winter feeling.

### Fancy Zombies
Zombies will have more and and a higher speed, and multiple zombie variants will occasionally spawn so beware.
They will also be immune to sunlight, meaning they won't burn during the day.
These zombies will also be infectious (of wich the chance can be lowered by wearing armor), so look out for Contagious Flesh and find the cure.

### Create
Power up your base with the Create mod.
You can make automatic farms and interconnected train tracks with your friend's base (or other farms).
Or have automatic doors and airlocks to keep you safe from outer danger.

### It also contains
- Base protection with Create Big Cannons and it's Radar addon.
- Advanced cooking with Farmers Delight.
- A wide arsenal of weaponry with Spartan Weaponry.
- A huge block palette with Chipped.
- Underground bunker for you to uncover.
- Surveillance cameras to help the safekeeping of your home.
- Nuclear energy to have a very apocalypse- like way of generating power.
- Voice Chat with Radios for long distance communication.
- And many more QOL and content mods...

# Planned Updates
- Integration with Mutants and Zombies
- Guide book for getting started
- Custom music
